first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same low score (2/10) for the same core reasons: the candidate is vastly overqualified for a junior role and lacks the required German language skills. The minor differences in wording between the justification, strengths, and concerns are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's suitability.
